changelog: chore(daemon): clean up unused HTTP helpers after WS migration
feat(daemon): convert periodic HTTP pushes and snapshot polling to WebSocket
feat(daemon): replace HTTP polling with WS message handlers for request/response flows
feat(daemon): create unified DaemonWsClient with queue-based thread-safe dispatch
feat(ws): push all work requests to daemon via WS, handle all result messages
refactor(ws): dispatch daemon WS messages via handler table
feat(ws): add daemon WebSocket protocol module with message types and push helper
